events.title: World Environment Day
events.summary: The United Nations' principal vehicle for encouraging awareness and action for the protection of the environment, with themes ranging from marine pollution to sustainable consumption.

events.title: National Fish and Chip Day (UK)
events.summary: A celebration of the UK's most iconic dish. It brings together fish and chip shops, pubs, and restaurants to celebrate the heritage of the meal and the industry behind it.

events.title: Global Running Day
events.summary: A light-hearted worldwide celebration of running that encourages everyone to get moving, regardless of their fitness level or distance covered.
